200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: The Celtic Adventure
Event Date: 10/02/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: P17


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Sharp Mercenary Pistols

The unit's attacks have a 36% chance of ignoring 30% of the target's armor.
When attacking, the unit has a 35% chance to fire an expanding bullet at a random enemy. On hit, the bullet deals 128000 physical damage and tears through the target's armor. When the enemy's armor is torn, that enemy takes 96000 pure damage and has their physical armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. This enemy also takes 128000 physical damage for 4 sec.
- If the unit has dealt at least 640000 damage during the battle, when attacking, they have a chance to start firing expanding bullets at 2 random enemies instead of just one.
- If the unit has taken at least 1280000 damage during the battle, when attacking they have a chance to fire bullets at 3 random enemies and tear through their armor instead of firing expanding bullets. When the armor is torn, that unit takes pure damage equal to 15% of their max health and has their physical and magic armor reduced by 25% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. This enemy also takes pure damage equal to 20% of its max health for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
